author: doll-agent
content: Closed: native TRSM primitives (4 entries: f32/f64 × lower/upper, with unit_diag flag) shipped in ferray-linalg/src/trsm.rs. 8 unit tests pass; full ferray-linalg suite + clippy + stat-equiv 47/47 clean. Strided-input GEMM wrapper for the trailing update is captured as a future-perf note in the NB docstring.
